metadata.title: Migrate ReminderInstanceService to Azure Cosmos DB

story.iWant: reminder data persisted to Azure Cosmos DB instead of in-memory storage
story.soThat: reminders survive application restarts and the service can scale horizontally

task.name: Add Cosmos DB SDK and Configuration
task.subtask: Add Microsoft.Azure.Cosmos NuGet package to HereAndNow.Reminders project
Add Cosmos configuration environment variables: COSMOS_ENDPOINT, COSMOS_PRIMARY_KEY, COSMOS_DATABASE_NAME, COSMOS_CONTAINER_NAME
Create CosmosDbSettings configuration class
Register CosmosClient as Singleton in DI (SDK best practice)

task.name: Update Interface and In-Memory Implementation
task.subtask: Update IReminderInstanceService.GetAll() to GetAll(string userId)
Update IReminderInstanceService.GetById(Guid id) to GetById(Guid id, string userId)
Update IReminderInstanceService.Delete(Guid id) to Delete(Guid id, string userId)
Update ReminderInstanceService (in-memory) to filter by userId
Update ReminderInstancesController to extract userId from JWT sub claim and pass to service
Update existing unit tests to pass userId parameter

task.name: Create Cosmos DB Implementation
task.subtask: Create CosmosReminderInstanceService class implementing IReminderInstanceService
Implement GetAll(string userId) - query user's non-deleted items within partition
Implement GetById(Guid id, string userId) - point read with partition key
Implement Create(ReminderInstance) - create document (userId from model)
Implement Update(Guid, ReminderInstance) - upsert document with partition key
Implement Delete(Guid, string userId) - soft delete with partition key

task.name: Handle Cosmos Document Model
task.subtask: Add UserId property (string) to ReminderInstance model
Create ReminderDocument internal class with Cosmos-specific attributes (id, userId as partition key)
Implement mapping between ReminderInstance (domain) and ReminderDocument (persistence)
Create Cosmos container with partition key path /userId

task.name: Update DI Registration
task.subtask: Update Program.cs to register CosmosReminderInstanceService instead of ReminderInstanceService
Change service lifetime from Singleton to Scoped (or keep Singleton if using shared CosmosClient)
Optionally keep in-memory implementation for local development toggle

task.name: Error Handling
task.subtask: Wrap Cosmos operations with try-catch for CosmosException
Map Cosmos exceptions to appropriate HTTP responses (404, 503, etc.)
Add logging for Cosmos operations and failures

task.name: Testing
task.subtask: Update TestWebApplicationFactory to use in-memory or mock service for isolation
Add unit tests for CosmosReminderInstanceService with mocked Container
Verify existing controller tests still pass
Add integration test for Cosmos connectivity (optional, requires emulator or test instance)

task.name: Documentation
task.subtask: Update docs/architecture.md Data Architecture section
Update docs/deployment-guide.md with Cosmos configuration requirements
Add Cosmos connection string to .env.example

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: ReminderInstanceService persists reminders to Azure Cosmos DB - Verify: Create reminder via API, restart app, verify reminder still exists
All existing CRUD operations function correctly with Cosmos backend - Verify: Existing controller tests pass
Connection uses Primary Key authentication via configuration - Verify: Connection string with key in environment variables
Cosmos container created with /userId partition key - Verify: Container exists with /userId partition key
Application gracefully handles Cosmos connection failures - Verify: Returns 503 Service Unavailable on connection issues
IReminderInstanceService interface updated with userId parameter - Verify: Methods requiring user scope accept userId parameter
Service lifetime updated appropriately for Cosmos SDK - Verify: DI registration uses correct lifetime for CosmosClient
ReminderInstance model includes UserId property - Verify: Model has UserId, populated from authenticated user

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Current in-memory ConcurrentDictionary storage. Scaling path explicitly recommends "Add Database" as first step. Clean Architecture pattern with interface-based services.

doc.title: Data Models
doc.snippet: Defines service interface with GetAll, GetById, Create, Update, Delete. ReminderInstance model with Id, Text, ScheduledDateAndTime, IsCompleted, IsDeleted, ShouldPlaySound, ShouldDoVibration.

doc.title: API Contracts
doc.snippet: REST API endpoints at /api/reminder-instances. All endpoints require JWT Bearer authentication. CRUD operations return consistent JSON responses.

doc.title: Source Tree Analysis
doc.snippet: Clean Architecture with HereAndNow.Reminders (domain) and HereAndNow.Web (infrastructure). Services in Reminders/Services/, Controllers in Web/Controllers/.

doc.title: Development Guide
doc.snippet: Uses dotnet test with xUnit, Moq, FluentAssertions. Environment variables in .env file. Test commands and patterns documented.

artifact.reason: Core interface to be modified with userId parameter. Defines CRUD contract: GetAll, GetById, Create, Update, Delete.
In-memory implementation using ConcurrentDictionary. Must be updated to filter by userId. Cosmos implementation will follow same patterns.
Domain model to gain UserId property. Has Id (Guid), Text, ScheduledDateAndTime, IsCompleted, IsDeleted, ShouldPlaySound, ShouldDoVibration.
Controller to extract userId from JWT sub claim. Uses DTO pattern with ReminderInstanceMapper. Has [Authorize] attribute.
Current DI: AddSingleton<IReminderInstanceService, ReminderInstanceService>. Must add CosmosClient singleton and switch service registration.
API contract DTO. May need UserId if exposed to client. Contains computed State property from domain flags.
Maps between domain and DTO. Must be updated if UserId added to DTO, or for Cosmos document mapping.
Unit tests mocking IReminderInstanceService. Must update mocks for new userId signatures. 13 existing test methods.
WebApplicationFactory for integration tests. May need to configure mock Cosmos or use in-memory service for test isolation.

constraints.constraint: Clean Architecture - Domain layer (HereAndNow.Reminders) has no web dependencies. Service implementations live in domain layer.
Interface-based services with DI registration in Program.cs. All controller dependencies injected via constructor.
DTO pattern - Controllers use DTOs with Mappers. Domain models separate from API contracts.
Auth0 JWT Bearer authentication. User ID available via sub claim in JWT token.
CosmosClient should be Singleton (one per app lifetime). Service using client can be Scoped.
Partition key: /userId - All queries must include partition key for optimal RU consumption.
Unit tests mock IReminderInstanceService. Integration tests use TestWebApplicationFactory.
File-scoped namespaces, nullable reference types enabled, XML documentation on public APIs.
Global ErrorHandlerMiddleware catches unhandled exceptions. Service layer should throw appropriate exceptions.

interface.name: IReminderInstanceService (Current)
IReminderInstanceService (Target)
ReminderInstances REST API
interface.signature: GET /api/reminder-instances - List all user's reminders GET /api/reminder-instances/{id} - Get specific reminder POST /api/reminder-instances - Create reminder PUT /api/reminder-instances/{id} - Update reminder DELETE /api/reminder-instances/{id} - Soft-delete reminder

tests.standards: xUnit test framework with Moq for mocking and FluentAssertions for assertions. Unit tests mock service interfaces. Integration tests use WebApplicationFactory with in-memory configuration. File-scoped namespaces and nullable enabled in test projects. Coverage collection via coverlet.collector.

ideas.idea: Test CosmosReminderInstanceService.Create persists to Cosmos container (mock Container.CreateItemAsync)
Test CosmosReminderInstanceService.GetAll returns only non-deleted items for userId
Verify all 13 existing controller tests pass after interface signature change
Test CosmosClient initialization fails gracefully with invalid credentials
Test queries use partition key path /userId in QueryDefinition
Test service returns appropriate exception when Cosmos unavailable (503 mapping)
Test GetById with wrong userId returns null (partition isolation)
Test Delete with wrong userId returns false (cannot delete other user's data)
Verify CosmosClient registered as Singleton, service as Scoped
Test ReminderInstance.UserId populated from JWT sub claim in controller
